name: Villa Grove State Bank
description_short: Community-focused state bank serving Villa Grove and Douglas County since 1919, offering traditional banking services with a hometown feel and personal service.
description_long:
Villa Grove State Bank is a locally-rooted financial institution that has served the Villa Grove and Douglas County communities for over 100 years, celebrating a centennial milestone in 2023. Founded in 1919, the bank has built its reputation on personal, friendly service and deep community ties, employing and serving local members as core to its operational philosophy. The bank positions itself explicitly as a "Hometown Community Bank" with emphasis on putting community first in all operations.

The bank offers a range of traditional banking services including checking and savings accounts, online banking access, e-statements, safe deposit boxes, direct deposit, wire transfers (domestic and foreign), money orders, and cashier's checks. They maintain a drive-up facility with ATM access for convenient fund withdrawal and deposit. Payment services are available for local utilities (Mediacom, Villa Grove Water and Sewer), and all deposits are FDIC-insured to at least $250,000 per depositor, providing standard federal protection.

What distinguishes Villa Grove State Bank is its explicit commitment to local presence and community-first operations. Rather than pursuing aggressive technology expansion or widespread geographic growth, the bank maintains focus on personal service delivery and local relationship banking. They actively engage with the community through social media and local events, and advertise accessibility via direct phone contact (217-832-2631) as a primary service channel.

For consumers seeking basic banking services, Villa Grove State Bank delivers reliable, FDIC-insured banking with personal service and local accountability. However, the bank's service offerings are limited to core banking functions—there is no evidence of competitive rates, investment products, or specialized lending products. The bank appears best suited for customers already embedded in the Villa Grove/Douglas County area who value personal relationships over feature-rich digital banking or competitive yield rates.
services: Direct deposit from employers and Social Security
Local bill payments (Mediacom, Villa Grove Water and Sewer)
FDIC deposit insurance ($250,000 per depositor minimum)
pros: 100+ year operating history demonstrates long-term stability and trust in the community
FDIC insurance protection up to $250,000 per depositor for account safety
Convenient drive-up ATM facility for 24/7 cash access without entering the bank
Online banking access with e-statement option for paperless account management
Local bill payment services for Mediacom and water/sewer utilities
Multiple fund transfer options including wire transfers (domestic and international)
Safe deposit boxes available in multiple sizes for document and valuables storage
cons: Website lacks information on deposit rates, loan rates, or fee schedules for comparison shopping
No evidence of competitive products like high-yield savings, money market accounts, or investment services
Limited service area (Villa Grove and Douglas County only) restricts accessibility for non-local customers
No mention of mobile banking app, mobile check deposit, or advanced digital banking features
Wire transfer and money order services carry fees, but amounts are not disclosed on website

contact.address: 10 N Main St, Villa Grove, IL 61956

best_for: Villa Grove and Douglas County residents seeking reliable community banking with personal service
Customers who value face-to-face relationships and local accountability over digital-first banking
Small business owners and individuals who need basic checking, savings, and wire transfer services locally
Customers seeking FDIC-insured deposits with convenient ATM and drive-up access
diagnosis: Villa Grove State Bank is best for longtime residents of Villa Grove and Douglas County who prioritize personal banking relationships and community presence over competitive rates or digital innovation. The main caveat is that the bank appears to offer only basic traditional banking services without competitive rate information or specialized products, making it unsuitable for customers seeking high-yield savings, investment services, or a comprehensive digital banking experience.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 10 N Main St, Villa Grove, IL 61956
